---
layout: none
permalink: /llms.txt
---
# Gregology

> {{ site.description }}

## Pages
{% assign md_pages = site.pages | where: "layout", "markdown" -%}
{% for page in md_pages -%}
{% assign segments = page.url | remove_first: "/" | split: "/" -%}
{% if segments.size == 1 and page.title and page.title != "" -%}
- [{{ page.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ page.original_url }}): [{{ page.title }} (markdown)]({{ site.url }}{{ page.url }})
{% endif -%}
{% endfor %}
## Posts
{% for post in site.posts -%}
{% assign len = post.url | size | minus: 1 -%}
{% assign post_md_url = post.url | truncate: len, "" | append: ".md" -%}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}): [{{ post.title }} (markdown)]({{ site.url }}{{ post_md_url }})
{% endfor %}
